description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a thick, cylindrical black metal head with two flat striking faces, ideal for delivering powerful blows. The head is solid and heavy, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and the marking 'NHM' clearly visible on one side. The handle is made of wood, displaying a natural brown color with a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The wood grain is visible, and the handle tapers slightly towards the end, providing a comfortable hold. The junction between the head and handle is tightly fitted, with no visible gaps or fasteners. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a black metal head and a curved wooden handle, marked 'NHM' on the head. The tool is clean, sturdy, and designed for powerful impacts.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the 'NHM' marking on the black metal head and the full length of the curved wooden handle.
description_view_1: Direct end-on view of the handle, highlighting its straight alignment and the circular cross-section of the head.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view displaying the other side of the head and the ergonomic curve of the wooden handle.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the flat striking face of the head and the handle's attachment point.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish and visible wood grain, ergonomically shaped for grip.
attribute_head_type: Sledgehammer head with two flat striking faces, cylindrical and made of black steel.
